title: Implement shooting engine orchestrator (steps 3-9: ShootPredicate -> PreShootEvent -> snapshot -> spread -> register -> sound -> PostShootEvent)

reference_files.reason: Full shooting timing steps 1-9: intercept -> fire rate -> ShootPredicate -> PreShootEvent -> snapshot -> spread -> register bullet -> sound -> PostShootEvent
Timing notes - checks after fire rate execute once, ShootPredicate registered by other mods (framework registers 0), snapshot freezes attributes, onHit after damage
Sound system - read sounds.shoot from gun definition, play at shooter position, all nearby players hear
Damage type preset mechanism - read modularshoot:ammo_damage_type per-gun state at step 5, empty/unregistered uses default modularshoot:bullet_damage

acceptance_criteria: ShootingEngine class created as the orchestrator called by ShootPacketHandler (subtask 16) after fire rate + anti-cheat pass
Step 3 (ShootPredicate): execute all registered ShootPredicate.test(player, gun), if any returns failure -> display reason to player (action bar), abort shooting
Step 4 (PreShootEvent): fire PreShootEvent on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS with player + gun ItemStack, if cancelled -> abort shooting (does NOT count against fire rate limit)
Step 5 (Attribute snapshot): read all framework attribute final values via player.getAttributeValue(), read activated boolean traits, freeze into BulletSnapshot

Snapshot includes: stats map (all attribute IDs -> values), traits map (all trait IDs -> booleans), damageType (read modularshoot:ammo_damage_type per-gun state, empty -> default modularshoot:bullet_damage), shooter UUID, gunId, gunInstanceUuid
Step 6 (Spread): read player.getLookAngle(), apply SpreadCalculator.applySpread() with accuracy_yaw, accuracy_pitch, server RandomSource

Step 7 (Register bullet): launch position = player.getEyePosition(), submit BulletSnapshot + position + direction + bullet_speed + range to BulletManager, BulletManager creates BulletRecord with assigned ID
Step 8 (Sound): read gun definition's sounds.shoot sound ID, play at shooter position (level.playSound or similar, all nearby players hear)
Step 9 (PostShootEvent): fire PostShootEvent on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS with player + gun ItemStack + BulletRecord (non-cancellable)
Each step implemented as separate small method (under 50 lines), orchestrator method chains them
